Common.secretSaved: Encrypted key saved locally. Original value cannot be viewed.
Common.replaceSecretPlaceholder: Enter a new key to replace saved key…

AccessPassword.title: Access required
AccessPassword.subtitle: Enter the deployment password to continue.
AccessPassword.invalidWithRemaining: Invalid access password. {count, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}} remaining.
AccessPassword.locked: Too many failed attempts. Try again in {time}.
AccessPassword.genericError: Unable to verify the access password. Please try again.
AccessPassword.secretStored: The password is verified by the server and is not stored in this page.

DeploymentHealth.title: Deployment Health
DeploymentHealth.subtitle: Runtime checks for the services that affect hosted and self-hosted reliability.
DeploymentHealth.byokStable: A stable server key is configured.
DeploymentHealth.byokEphemeral: Ephemeral keys are allowed; configure a stable key before production.
DeploymentHealth.byokMissing: No stable BYOK key is configured.
DeploymentHealth.storesShared: Rate limit, document job, and plugin registry stores use shared storage.
DeploymentHealth.storesMemory: One or more memory stores are in use; this is only suitable for local or single-instance deployments.
DeploymentHealth.storesMissingHosted: Hosted mode needs shared rate limit, document job, and plugin registry stores.
DeploymentHealth.defaultModelReady: A usable model source is available.
DeploymentHealth.defaultModelMissing: No server or local model source is configured.
DeploymentHealth.searchReady: Search is available through server defaults or local settings.
DeploymentHealth.ragReady: Knowledge retrieval or document parsing is available.
DeploymentHealth.ragMissing: RAG and document parsing are not configured.
DeploymentHealth.voiceReady: Speech services are available through server defaults or local settings.
DeploymentHealth.pluginsReady: At least one plugin is installed locally.
DeploymentHealth.pluginsRegistryMissingHosted: Hosted custom plugins need a shared server registry.

System.systemPromptDesc: This prompt is injected into all conversations. Assistant-specific instructions will be inserted into the tag.
System.autoTitleDesc: Create a summary title after first turn
System.htmlVisualPromptDesc: Guide models to use safe inline HTML for compact visual structures when helpful
System.htmlVisualPromptAria: Guide models to use safe inline HTML
System.autoCompressDesc: Summarize long histories to save tokens
System.exportAllDataDesc: Download chats, settings, providers, plugins, assistants, and knowledge metadata as a local JSON backup.
System.exportError: Failed to export local data. Please try again.
System.clearAllDataDesc: Permanently remove all chats, settings, and local data.
System.clearConfirmHint: Click Confirm Clear within 5 seconds to permanently remove local data.
System.clearError: Failed to clear all data. Please try again.

Voice.title: Voice Services
Voice.voiceNoteModeDesc: Audio will be sent as a voice message attachment instead of being converted to text.

DefaultModels.title: Default Models
DefaultModels.subtitle: Configure the AI models used for background tasks and automated features.
DefaultModels.conversationTitleDesc: Used to generate a concise title after the first exchange in a new chat.
DefaultModels.relatedQuestionsDesc: Used to suggest follow-up questions after an AI response.
DefaultModels.contextCompressionDesc: Used to summarize long conversations when token limits are approached.
DefaultModels.promptOptimizationDesc: Use AI to improve text content.
DefaultModels.ragQueryDesc: Used to generate optimized search queries for the Knowledge Base.
DefaultModels.memoryDesc: Used to extract, consolidate, and maintain long-term local memories.

Memory.title: Memory
Memory.subtitle: Stores durable preferences, project facts, instructions, and decisions locally in IndexedDB. Retrieved memories may be sent to the current model as context.
Memory.searchToggleDesc: Allow the model to call a local memory search tool when past context may matter.
Memory.recordToggleDesc: Use a background AI task to save only important long-term information.
Memory.dreamToggleDesc: When active memories exceed 100, consolidate them into 50 or fewer entries.
Memory.privacyNote: Memories stay in this browser by default. Search results are included in the current model request when the memory tool is used.
Memory.contentPlaceholder: Write a durable preference, instruction, project fact, warning, decision, or context note…

RAG.title: Knowledge Base (RAG)
RAG.supportDesc: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) allows the AI to search your own private documents to provide more accurate responses. Use Mineru or LlamaParse for document parsing and Upstash for lightning-fast retrieval.
RAG.defaultDocumentProcessingDesc: Use the server-configured parser without entering a key.
RAG.mineruHelp: Mineru parses documents without a token by default. Add a token for the precise parsing API.
RAG.llamaParseHelp: Retrieves high-quality markdown and tables from complex documents like PDFs.
RAG.chunkSizeHelp: Determines the size of text segments stored in the database. Smaller chunks (e.g. 512) offer more precise retrieval, while larger chunks (e.g. 2048) provide more context per result.
RAG.defaultVectorStorageDesc: Use the server-configured vector store without entering a URL or token.

Search.title: Search Services
Search.defaultServiceDesc: Use the server-configured search service without entering parameters.
Search.modelBuiltInDesc: Use the active model's built-in search: Gemini Google Search for Gemini models, OpenAI Web Search for OpenAI Responses models. OpenAI-compatible models should use an external search provider.

Providers.keyStoredLocally: Your key is encrypted locally in this browser.
Providers.serverDefaultProviderDesc: This provider is supplied by server environment variables. Its key and base URL are not sent to the browser.
Providers.enterApiKeyFirst: Please enter an API Key first.
Providers.errorFetchingModels: Error fetching models. Please check Base URL and API Key.

Sidebar.exportError: Couldn't export this chat. Please try again.

MessageInput.searchUnavailableNoProvider: No active model provider is available for search.
MessageInput.searchUnavailableGoogleGemini: Google Search only works with Gemini models. Choose an external search provider for this model.
MessageInput.searchUnavailableModelBuiltIn: Model built-in search is only available with Gemini or OpenAI Responses models. Choose an external search provider for OpenAI-compatible models.
MessageInput.searchUnavailableApiKey: {provider} search requires an API key in Settings.
MessageInput.searchUnavailableBaseUrl: {provider} search requires a base URL in Settings.
MessageInput.searchUnavailableGeneric: Search is unavailable with the current configuration.
MessageInput.htmlVisualPromptEnabled: HTML visual layout is enabled. Complex structures will guide the model toward safe inline HTML.
MessageInput.htmlVisualPromptDisabled: HTML visual layout is disabled. The model will prefer ordinary Markdown responses.
MessageInput.polishFailed: Couldn't polish the text. Please try again.

Plugin.authStorageDesc: Authorization keys are encrypted locally in this browser and injected when the AI calls these tools.
Plugin.noAuthRequired: No authorization required for this plugin.

Plugin.title: Plugins
Plugin.subtitle: Discover and connect tools powered by APIs.guru

Content.memorySearchFound: {count, plural, one {Found # relevant memory} other {Found # relevant memories}}
Content.pythonSimulationNotice: This Python result is simulated by the selected OpenAI-compatible model, not produced by a real Python runtime.
Content.geminiCodeExecutionNotice: This Python result is produced through Gemini's codeExecution tool when the model returns an execution result.
Content.modelCodeExecutionNotice: This Python result depends on the selected model's code execution behavior.
Content.jsSandboxNotice: This JavaScript runs locally in an isolated browser iframe with network access disabled and a short timeout.

Config.pluginJinaDescription: Converts any URL into LLM-friendly markdown content. Useful for reading documentation, articles, or any webpage context.
Config.pluginWeatherDescription: Get real-time weather information including temperature, conditions, and humidity for any city.
Config.pluginUnsplashDescription: Search for high-quality photos on Unsplash.
Config.pluginAgnesImageDescription: Generate images with Agnes Image 2.1 Flash from text prompts or input images.
Config.pluginAgnesVideoDescription: Create and retrieve video generation tasks with Agnes Video V2.0.

Skill.title: Skills
Skill.subtitle: Use text-only instructions to shape model responses
Skill.noLocalSkills: No custom skills yet. Create one to pin your own response workflow.
Skill.noInstalledSkills: No installed skills yet. Install or create a skill to enable it in the composer.
Skill.installFailed: Skill installation failed. Refresh and try again.
